name: excel-cli
description: Create, open, read, and edit Excel spreadsheets. Drives the locally installed Excel via AppleScript on macOS.
author: ScripTron Community

args_schema.name: action
args_schema.description: Action to perform: open | create | read | write | append

args_schema.name: sheet
args_schema.description: Sheet name to operate on (optional, defaults to first sheet)

args_schema.name: data
args_schema.description: JSON array of row objects for write/append actions

args_schema.name: output
args_schema.description: Output file path (for read action, defaults to stdout)
